description: Multiple PHP remote file inclusion vulnerabilities in Turnkey Web Tools PHP Simple Shop 2.0 and earlier allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code via a URL in the abs_path parameter to (1) admin/index.php, (2) admin/adminindex.php, (3) admin/adminglobal.php, (4) admin/login.php, (5) admin/menu.php or (6) admin/header.php.
